Source.Name: aerion
Source.Description: Aerion is a modern, lightweight email client inspired by Geary, focused on resource efficiency and a clean user experience. It supports Gmail, Outlook, Microsoft 365, and generic IMAP/SMTP, with conversation threading, rich text composition, contact sync, PGP/S/MIME, and multiple color themes.

Package.Name: aerion
Package.Description: Aerion is a modern, lightweight email client inspired by Geary, focused on resource efficiency and a clean user experience. It supports Gmail, Outlook, Microsoft 365, and generic IMAP/SMTP, with conversation threading, rich text composition, contact sync, PGP/S/MIME, and multiple color themes.
